$comment: Channel config for inbound report discovery (P079 / ADR-062). Read by /wr-itil:review-problems Step 8.5. Adopters edit channels[] to suit their tracker setup. ttl_seconds controls cache freshness; --force-upstream-recheck flag bypasses.

channels.$filter-note: P373 (2026-06-27): `title_prefix` is now a SOFT signal — the Step 4.5c poll fetches ALL open issues and does NOT discard non-`[problem]`-prefixed ones. ANY open issue is a potential problem report (JTBD-301: reporters must not pre-classify; #273 was silently dropped by the old hard filter). The Step 4.5d semantic-comparator + Step 4.5e JTBD-alignment + dual-axis-risk classifiers are the de-facto filters and emit a verdict for every report (ADR-062). `title_prefix` is retained only as a rank/annotate hint. Set `strict_title_prefix: true` to opt back into a hard channel-boundary pre-filter (discards non-prefixed issues). History: label filter removed 2026-05-15 (repo has no `problem-report` label; `problem-report.yml` auto-labels also absent).
